fields.acceptance_criteria: Store open path avoids blocking Tokio worker while holding std::sync::Mutex; concurrent first-open requests are safe and efficient.
fields.title: Tech debt: registry.get holds sync mutex during blocking store open

fields.title: Tech debt: registry.get holds sync mutex during blocking store open
fields.validation_plan: Benchmark/trace concurrent first-open requests; verify no long mutex hold on Tokio worker and no regressions in single-workspace startup

fields.acceptance_criteria: Store open path avoids blocking Tokio worker while holding std::sync::Mutex; concurrent first-open requests are safe and efficient.
fields.implementation_note: WorkspaceRegistry::get now uses double-check locking and opens stores outside the mutex to avoid blocking lock hold during I/O.
